subject: Fwd: From Msg Sheet
body:
I took care of Sikorsky and the new helicopter.  Geoge's offer is unclear.  I am trying to find out what he means by you will net 12.4 mm  I will let you know.

He has a buyer who is ready to put a deposit down > that would net JE 12.4.  As far as the 2nd S76 Sikorsky needs to > know if he is moving forward because they have another buyer.  > Please call.

body_html:
I took care of Sikorsky and the new helicopter.  Geoge's offer is unclear.  I am trying to find out what he means by you will net 12.4 mm  I will let you know.

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: lkwintner@nysgmail.com (lauren)
Date: November 7, 2007 1:30:32 PM GMT-04:00
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: From Msg Sheet

From: George Reenstra Taken by: LAUREN on 11/07/2007
Phone# 201 906-1411

for 1 an 1/2 hours and after that in the office 201-995-9570.  He e-mailed you a few things.  Briefly, he neds to know about the sale of the forst S76.  He has a buyer who is ready to put a deposit down that would net JE 12.4.  As far as the 2nd S76 Sikorsky needs to know if he is moving forward because they have another buyer.  Please call.

** End of Message
